notes: Firebase alignment is general enough knowledge that baseline also covers it well
Eval 3 (Firebase Alignment) passes 100% in both configurations — this is general Firebase knowledge not exclusive to the skill
Evals 1 and 2 show maximum differentiation: skill 100% vs baseline 0% — the skill provides critical iOS-specific knowledge that baseline models hallucinate incorrectly
Without-skill response for Eval 1 gives WRONG advice (adding empty BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers instead of removing 'processing') — could cause wasted developer time
Without-skill response for Eval 2 targets wrong background mode (remote-notification instead of push-to-talk)
Skill runs are faster on average (28.7s vs 40.2s) — less exploration needed because the skill points directly to the answer
